notes: Indeed DE job search homepage. Two-field job search form (Jobtitel + Ort), sign-in link, main nav (Startseite, Unternehmensbewertungen, Gehaelter finden), CTA button, footer. The 'Form (2 fields)' was a duplicate of the search form. Screenshot shows no cookie consent overlay in this capture.
